scenes.text: Welcome to our lecture on Docker, a revolutionary tool for automating the deployment of applications inside lightweight, portable containers. In this scene, we will introduce Docker's core concepts: containers, images, and the Docker engine. You'll learn how Docker simplifies application deployment and management by encapsulating the entire runtime environment, ensuring consistent operation across different environments.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Docker] --> B[Containers]; A --> C[Images]; A --> D[Docker Engine]; B --> E[Portable]; C --> F[Reusable]; D --> G[Encapsulates Environment];
